ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial entry */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets of the corporation */,
  "tangible_assets" REAL /* Value of tangible assets */,
  "intangible_assets" REAL /* Value of intangible assets */,
  "net_revenue" REAL /* Net revenue generated */,
  "profit_before_taxes" REAL /* Profit before tax deductions */,
  "profit_after_taxes" REAL /* Profit after tax deductions */,
  "inventory" REAL /* Value of inventory held */,
  "liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities of the corporation */,
  "cash_and_cash_equivalents" REAL /* Cash and cash equivalents */,
  "equity" REAL /* Total equity of the corporation */,
  "short_term_liabilities" REAL /* Total short-term liabilities */,
  "long_term_liabilities" REAL /* Total long-term liabilities */,
  "cost_price" REAL /* Cost price of goods sold */,
  "fixed_assets_depreciation" REAL /* Depreciation on fixed assets */,
  "lending_cost" REAL /* Lending costs incurred */,
  "short_term_borrowings_financial_leases" REAL /* Short-term borrowings and financial leases */,
  "long_term_borrowings_financial_leases" REAL /* Long-term borrowings and financial leases */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the financial entry */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter of the financial entry */,
  "geographical_region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the financial entry */,
  "business_unit" TEXT /* Business unit of the financial entry */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the financial entry */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate to a standard currency */,
  "reporting_period" TEXT /* Reporting period (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annually) */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the data */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_value"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_equity FOREIGN KEY ("equity") REFERENCES equity ("equity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_liabilities FOREIGN KEY ("liabilities") REFERENCES liabilities ("liability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_quarter FOREIGN KEY ("quarter") REFERENCES quarters ("quarter_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_total_assets FOREIGN KEY ("total_assets") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quarters" (
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quarter */,
  "quarter_name" TEXT /* Name of the quarter (e.g., Q1, Q2) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the quarter */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the quarter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quarter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_value" INTEGER /* The year represented (e.g., 2021) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset type */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., Tangible, Intangible) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset type */,
  "parent_asset_id" INTEGER /* Parent asset type ID for hierarchical structure */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the asset type is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "liabilities" (
  "liability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each liability type */,
  "liability_type" TEXT /* Type of liability (e.g., Short-term, Long-term) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the liability type */,
  "parent_liability_id" INTEGER /* Parent liability type ID for hierarchical structure */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the liability type is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("liability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equity" (
  "equity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equity type */,
  "equity_type" TEXT /* Type of equity (e.g., Common Stock, Preferred Stock) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equity type */,
  "parent_equity_id" INTEGER /* Parent equity type ID for hierarchical structure */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the equity type is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric (e.g., EBIT, EBITDA) */,
  "calculation" TEXT /* Calculation method for the metric */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the metric is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., finance analyst, manager) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is currently active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser and device information) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
